case_title: WING YIU LI VS. JOHN YICK ON WONG

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,300.00 FILED BY LI, WING YIU AS TO DEFENDANT ON WONG, JOHN YICK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-06-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$55.00) SERVED OCT-03-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ON WONG, JOHN YICK
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-06-2015 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-06-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-06-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---BANNIE CHOW. THE INTERPRETER'S IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. THE INTERPRETER HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LI, WING YIU IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ON WONG, JOHN YICK STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGEMENT MAIL RETURNED: NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED
